dataPack.volucraft.example_recipes.name: Volucraft: Example Recipes
volucraft.yacl.option.boolean.displayARG: Determines whether the Cube Background Color option is displayed in ARGB or RGBA.
volucraft.yacl.option.color.cubeBackgrou: Determines the color of the background of the cube area in the Amalgamation Table screen. Vanilla uses #8b8b8b for slots.
Determines the translucency of the 3D slots.
volucraft.yacl.option.integer.cubeHighli: Determines the translucency of the highlight of the selected slot.
volucraft.yacl.option.integer.cubeWithIt: Determines the translucency of a 3D slot when it has an item.
